feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: I pledge allegiance to the female population of /s4s/. I will see to it that each and every one of you precious dames is protected and served justice every day. Regularfemcel-chan as well as Riku-chan are two of the most brilliant shining beacons of great femininity that have ever spawned from this board whom must be cherished; they represent the freedom of all us /s4s/ers. I consider it my greatest and highest honour to serve on the front lines for the sake of all of you delightful madams. I wi

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Piercing setup idea
entry.content: So for a while I have been thinking about getting piercings and after some thoughts and tryouts with filters I have made a possible future piercing set up let me explain what's the setup Face: >eyebrow piercing (both eyebrows) >bridge piercing >angel fangs >ogre fangs (pretty sure that is how they are called) >labret and ashley >septum piercing Both Ears: >industrial >Helix >lobe >upper lobe >orbital >Daith I also plan on getting a tongue piercing and horizontal nipple piercings. I guess that is

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Say what you want about Ubisoft games, but can we take a minute to appreciate th…
entry.content: Say what you want about Ubisoft games, but can we take a minute to appreciate the Discovery Tour they've been adding to their latest games? It's really fucking kino to walk around Ancient Greece or Ancient Egypt with a curated guide. It's essentially a walking sim but the worlds are beautiful.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: First look at Taika Waititi’s new film with Jenna Ortega and Amy Adams

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Questions for those of understanding.
entry.content: I'm living in Germany (I'm American). I like ethnic hoes. I've noticed that they seem to really like these Turkmobiles. Anyhow, I could purchase one of these Bismillah Mashallah Werks for like 15k€. I'd be doing it solely to pull, I don't care about cars. Questions- 1. Is this a good car? I've read the F10 is the most efficient option for my purposes. 2. Should I just wait a year or two and buy one of the kidney grille ones? I like those better. Are there any performance improvements? 3. How muc

entry.title: /int/ International: I need to raise $9,000 for Dental Implants
entry.content: For years, I have struggled with severe dental problems that have deeply affected not only my physical health, but also my confidence, emotional well-being, and daily life. Missing and damaged teeth have caused constant anxiety, embarrassment, social isolation, and difficulty smiling, eating, and speaking comfortably. Dental implants are my opportunity to rebuild my smile, regain self-esteem, and improve my mental health and quality of life. Unfortunately, the full treatment is far beyond what I

entry.content: Is there any truth to the shit some people say about like non-shielded electronics leading to health problems/stray electricity creating harmful magnetic fields? Always thought this sounded like woo bullshit, and I guess "the science" says it isn't so, but, I'm not sure. How do proponents tell the difference between fatigue from just using a device versus the thing in question literally burning them?

entry.title: /int/ International: >Finland's most famous pine dies >The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli Nat…
entry.content: >Finland's most famous pine dies >The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died. >The contorted pine tree, long a landmark for hikers in Koli, has shed its needles and now stands as a dry, weathered trunk. The tree's decline was noticed by an Yle journalist during a hike in the area. >The pine, photographed by thousands of visitors to the park, had become a known natural landmark. >While pines can live for 500–600 years, the exact age of this particular tree is unclear. >The

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Best VTM game and it's not even close. Don't even think about suggesting games w…
entry.content: Best VTM game and it's not even close. Don't even think about suggesting games with dogwater combat like Redemption and Bloodlines 1 are better. It's better to be a focused, linear action game than a bad attempt at an RPG.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Someone on Instagram Threads asked white people when the last time we were perso…
entry.content: Someone on Instagram Threads asked white people when the last time we were personally threatened by a black person was. Lots of people responded with answers ranging from "20 years ago" to "20 minutes ago," and they described their experiences. But, there were also a bunch of people who, for some reason, felt the need to claim that they have only ever been threatened by other white people, or that they have been threatened by more white people than black people, which is not what the OP asked. I

entry.title: /b/ Random: IN BRIEF 68 By love, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. He has t…
entry.content: IN BRIEF 68 By love, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. He has thus provided the definitive, superabundant answer to the questions that man asks himself about the meaning and purpose of his life. 69 God has revealed himself to man by gradually communicating his own mystery in deeds and in words. 70 Beyond the witness to himself that God gives in created things, he manifested himself to our first parents, spoke to them and, after the fall, promised them salvation (cf Gen 3:15) and

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Imo the ultra thick carhartt heavyweight hoodies and sweatpants are just as good…
entry.content: Imo the ultra thick carhartt heavyweight hoodies and sweatpants are just as good as the typical dirty unwashable romper suit Riders usually wear. To me wearing thick sweats in the summer feels much cooler and cleaner feeling than sweating into a hot greasy biker suit. I am a skateboarder so i know how protective carhartt hwt sweats are. I havent even put a single hole or scrape on the carhartt sweats i wear skateboarding and i fall alot. I know how to roll with the flow and for that type of fall

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >Hey, you know how we design our engines so they obliterate themselves if a flim…
